ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code of the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g. Asia, Europe) */,
  "total_population" TEXT /* Total population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the population data belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "percent_of_world" REAL /* Percentage of the world's population that the country represents */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the population data was recorded */,
  "male_population" TEXT /* Number of males in the population */,
  "female_population" TEXT /* Number of females in the population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy at birth */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate per 1,000 population */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate per 1,000 population */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Net migration rate per 1,000 population */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is urban */,
  "rural_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is rural */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the population data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the trend belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population estimate */,
  "population_estimate" TEXT /* Estimated population for that year */,
  "male_population_estimate" TEXT /* Estimated number of males in the population */,
  "female_population_estimate" TEXT /* Estimated number of females in the population */,
  "median_age_estimate" REAL /* Estimated median age of the population */,
  "life_expectancy_estimate" REAL /* Estimated average life expectancy at birth */,
  "birth_rate_estimate" REAL /* Estimated birth rate per 1,000 population */,
  "death_rate_estimate" REAL /* Estimated death rate per 1,000 population */,
  "migration_rate_estimate" REAL /* Estimated net migration rate per 1,000 population */,
  "urban_population_estimate" REAL /* Estimated percentage of the population that is urban */,
  "rural_population_estimate" REAL /* Estimated percentage of the population that is rural */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the population trend record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "world_population" (
  "world_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each world population record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the total world population record */,
  "total_population" TEXT /* Estimated total world population for that year */,
  "male_population" TEXT /* Number of males in the world population */,
  "female_population" TEXT /* Number of females in the world population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the world population */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy at birth globally */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Global birth rate per 1,000 population */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Global death rate per 1,000 population */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Global net migration rate per 1,000 population */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the world population that is urban */,
  "rural_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the world population that is rural */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the world population record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("world_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_forecast" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population forecast record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the forecast belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the forecast */,
  "forecasted_population" TEXT /* Forecasted population for that year */,
  "male_population_forecast" TEXT /* Forecasted number of males in the population */,
  "female_population_forecast" TEXT /* Forecasted number of females in the population */,
  "median_age_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted median age of the population */,
  "life_expectancy_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted average life expectancy at birth */,
  "birth_rate_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted birth rate per 1,000 population */,
  "death_rate_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted death rate per 1,000 population */,
  "migration_rate_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted net migration rate per 1,000 population */,
  "urban_population_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted percentage of the population that is urban */,
  "rural_population_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted percentage of the population that is rural */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the population forecast record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_forecast_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the demographic data belongs to */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the country (people per square kilometer) */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is urban */,
  "male_population" TEXT /* Number of males in the population */,
  "female_population" TEXT /* Number of females in the population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy at birth */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate per 1,000 population */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate per 1,000 population */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Net migration rate per 1,000 population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the demographic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier for the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
